palettes: warm earth tones — terracotta, ochre, cream backgrounds, deep brown text
cool slate neutrals — slate background, off-white surfaces, deep teal accent
deep midnight — navy background, ivory text, gold accent (dark mode)
monochrome with one bold accent — greys plus electric magenta
high-contrast tech — pure white background, charcoal text, electric blue accent
forest greens — deep green background, warm tan surfaces, sand cream accent
vintage sepia — aged paper background, sepia text, burgundy accent
pastel mint — soft mint background, blush surfaces, lavender accent
desert palette — sand background, rust accent, dusty sky-blue secondary
nordic — icy white background, charcoal text, muted blue accent
newsprint editorial — off-white background, black ink text, single red kicker accent
neon dark — pitch-black background, electric green accent (dark mode)
muted jewel tones — desaturated emerald background, amethyst surfaces, sapphire accent
warm autumn — burnt-orange background, deep brown surfaces, cream text
pacific coast — teal background, coral accent, sand neutral
midcentury modern — mustard background, avocado-green surfaces, walnut accent
deep aubergine — plum background, ivory text, copper accent (dark mode)
minimal corporate — pure white background, neutral grey surfaces, single trustworthy blue accent
tropical — coral background, palm-green accent, sunset-peach neutrals
industrial concrete — concrete-grey background, off-white surfaces, safety-orange accent
